audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 4 people to Drumlin Farm and other Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuaries for $2 per visitor over the age of 2. This pass is a coupon and does not need to be returned to Acton Memorial Library. This pass is provided by the Friends of the Acton Libraries.
